title: coelogyne angustichila
intro: Coelogyne angustichila is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its narrow, greenish-yellow petals and a distinctive fragrance. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some studies suggest that Coelogyne angustichila may help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and provide relief from fever and sore throats. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
